message:
fix: shadow globals in executor, add fromElements + worker draw_describe

- executor.ts: shadow fetch/globalThis/self/process/require in
  new Function() to prevent LLM-generated code from accessing
  Worker globals (security hardening for CF Worker deployment)
- sdk.ts: extract fromElements() static method from fromFile() for
  reconstructing diagrams without filesystem access
- sdk-types.ts: add fromElements to type definitions
- worker/index.ts: add draw_describe tool accepting JSON string
  (worker has no filesystem, so accepts JSON instead of file path)
